hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：在巴基斯坦提出主办美伊会谈后，以色列袭击德黑兰；【CRYPTO】即使战争风险挥之不去，比特币拒绝下跌也表明了加密货币的潜在实力。

items.title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
items.summary: In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking is difficult in the current environment.
items.title_zh: 美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀
items.summary_zh: 这位央行行长在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，在当前环境下制定政策很困难。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran After Pakistan Offers to Host U.S.-Iran Talks
items.summary: The Pentagon said it was sending 2,000 airborne troops to the Middle East, even as President Trump seemed to endorse Pakistan’s offer to broker negotiations. It was unclear whether Iran and Israel supported a U.S. peace plan.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：在巴基斯坦提出主办美伊会谈后，以色列袭击德黑兰
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼表示将向中东派遣 2000 名空降兵，尽管特朗普总统似乎支持巴基斯坦斡旋谈判的提议。目前尚不清楚伊朗和以色列是否支持美国的和平计划。

items.title: Bitcoin’s refusal to fall signals crypto's underlying strength even as war risks linger
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 25, 2026
items.title_zh: 即使战争风险挥之不去，比特币拒绝下跌也表明了加密货币的潜在实力
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 25 日天气预报

items.title: Gold’s longest losing streak in a century meets bitcoin’s resurgence
items.summary: As gold posts its worst run since 1920, bitcoin gains ground and outperforms, pushing the BTC to gold ratio 30% higher, since the Middle East conflict started.
items.title_zh: 黄金百年来最长连跌遭遇比特币复苏
items.summary_zh: 随着金价创下 1920 年以来最糟糕的表现，比特币上涨并跑赢大盘，自中东冲突爆发以来，比特币与黄金的比率上涨了 30%。

items.title: Crypto broker Bitpanda launches blockchain to connect EU banks with tokenized assets
items.summary: The Vienna-based firm is joining the growing race joins race to build compliant blockchain rails for traditional securities like equities and funds.
items.title_zh: 加密货币经纪商 Bitpanda 推出区块链，将欧盟银行与代币化资产连接起来
items.summary_zh: 这家总部位于维也纳的公司正在加入这场日益激烈的竞赛，为股票和基金等传统证券建立合规的区块链轨道。

items.title: Bitcoin steadies above $71,000 as oil falls below $100 after U.S. drafts 15‑point Iran peace plan
items.summary: Brent crude fell 4.7% and Asian equities rallied 1.9% as Washington delivered a ceasefire proposal to Tehran via Pakistan, fueling the most sustained optimism since the conflict began a month ago.
items.title_zh: 美国起草 15 点伊朗和平计划后，油价跌破 100 美元，比特币稳定在 71,000 美元上方
items.summary_zh: 由于华盛顿通过巴基斯坦向德黑兰提出停火提案，布伦特原油下跌 4.7%，亚洲股市上涨 1.9%，助长了一个月前冲突开始以来最持续的乐观情绪。

items.title: Bhutan offloads $37 million worth of bitcoin as selling accelerates: onchain data
items.summary: Bhutan transferred 519.7 BTC, worth $36.75 million, to two wallets on Wednesday, according to Arkham data.
items.title_zh: 随着销售加速，不丹抛售了价值 3700 万美元的比特币：链上数据
items.summary_zh: 根据 Arkham 数据，不丹周三向两个钱包转移了 519.7 BTC，价值 3675 ​​万美元。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.
items.title_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官告诉 CNBC，世界“从未经历过”如此飙升的炼油利润
items.summary_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官 Patrick Pouyanné 谈论伊朗战争、与白宫达成的 10 亿美元协议、对美国的投资等。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙表示，从长远来看，伊朗战争使中东和平前景更好
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争爆发几周后，摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙对中东和平发表了乐观的看法。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对向软件公司提供私人信贷的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
items.summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普发表扭转市场的言论前几分钟，股票和石油期货成交量激增
items.summary_zh: 股票和原油早期成交量飙升的时机引起了交易员的注意。

items.title: BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns
items.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said staying invested through periods of turmoil has historically delivered far stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的拉里·芬克 (Larry Fink) 对市场时机发出警告，称错过最佳时机可能会使回报减半
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克表示，从历史上看，在动荡时期保持投资会带来更强劲的回报。

items.title: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
items.summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 谈 ETF：“我们希望与人们合作开发新产品”
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 表示愿意与华尔街合作开发与加密货币和代币化相关的新交易所交易基金产品。

items.title: Cheap Drones Remain Wild Card in Iran war
items.summary: Stopping Iran’s production of drones is critical to opening the Strait of Hormuz and halting its attacks on Gulf nations. But can it be done?
items.title_zh: 廉价无人机仍然是伊朗战争的不确定因素
items.summary_zh: 停止伊朗生产无人机对于开放霍尔木兹海峡并停止其对海湾国家的袭击至关重要。但能做到吗？

items.title: Sarah Mullally, the First Female Archbishop of Canterbury, is About to Be Enthroned
items.summary: Sarah Mullally will be installed on Wednesday at Canterbury Cathedral. Her appointment to the role has been both celebrated, and denounced by some factions within the global Anglican Church.
items.title_zh: 坎特伯雷第一位女大主教莎拉·穆拉利即将登基
items.summary_zh: 莎拉·穆拉利将于周三在坎特伯雷大教堂就职。她的任命受到了全球圣公会内部一些派系的庆祝和谴责。

items.title: Monument Bank to tokenize 250 million pounds of retail deposits in UK first
items.summary: The deposits will remain interest-bearing, fully backed, and protected by the country's Financial Services Compensation Scheme.
items.title_zh: Monument Bank 将首先在英国将 2.5 亿英镑的零售存款代币化
items.summary_zh: 这些存款将继续计息，并受到国家金融服务补偿计划的充分支持和保护。

items.title: STS Digital unveils structured crypto platform with Kraken as distribution partner
items.summary: The platform, which covers 400 tokens, is aimed at banks, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals and comes as digital assets face growing institutional demand.
items.title_zh: STS Digital 推出结构化加密平台，Kraken 作为分销合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: 该平台涵盖 400 种代币，面向银行、家族办公室和高净值个人，正值数字资产面临不断增长的机构需求。

items.title: Kraken first to roll out access to STS Digital’s new crypto option structured products
items.summary: Kraken is set to be the first platform to integrate STS’s structured products, according to an announcement on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: Kraken 率先推出 STS Digital 的新加密期权结构性产品
items.summary_zh: 根据周三的公告，Kraken 将成为第一个集成 STS 结构性产品的平台。

items.title: Ripple joins Singapore central bank initiative to test RLUSD trade settlements
items.summary: Ripple said it plans to deploy Unloq's platform to automate payment releases when predefined conditions are met.
items.title_zh: Ripple 加入新加坡央行测试 RLUSD 贸易结算的计划
items.summary_zh: Ripple 表示，计划部署 Unloq 平台，以便在满足预定义条件时自动付款。

items.title: Australia’s central bank says stablecoins, bank deposit tokens can coexist in $17 billion tokenization drive
items.summary: Assistant Governor Brad Jones said stablecoins and deposit tokens could play complementary roles as the RBA shifts to a 'how' approach.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚央行表示，稳定币和银行存款代币可以在 170 亿美元的代币化计划中共存
items.summary_zh: 助理行长布拉德·琼斯表示，随着澳大利亚央行转向“如何”方法，稳定币和存款代币可以发挥互补作用。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub

items.title: Bitcoin nears $72,000 as rising open interest signals growing leverage in choppy market
items.summary: BTC rises with equities while surging open interest and fading volatility point to leveraged positioning despite repeated rejections near $72,000.
items.title_zh: 比特币逼近 72,000 美元，未平仓合约增加表明波动市场中的杠杆作用不断增强
items.summary_zh: 尽管在 72,000 美元附近屡遭拒绝，但比特币随股市上涨，而未平仓合约激增和波动性减弱表明杠杆头寸已存在。

items.title: There's a huge $14 billion bitcoin options expiry this Friday and it points to $75,000 as price magnet
items.summary: Bitcoin options worth billions of dollars will expire on Deribit this Friday at 8:00 UTC.
items.title_zh: 价值 140 亿美元的比特币期权将于本周五到期，价格将指向 75,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 价值数十亿美元的比特币期权将于本周五 8:00 UTC 在 Deribit 到期。

items.title: Crypto giant debuts oil trading, but it's a different model to Hyperliquid's perps
items.summary: Leading crypto market maker Wintermute debuts WTI crude oil CFDs – an OTC derivative that lets traders speculate on oil prices 24/7.
items.title_zh: 加密巨头首次推出石油交易，但与 Hyperliquid 的 Perps 不同
items.summary_zh: 领先的加密货币做市商 Wintermute 首次推出 WTI 原油差价合约，这是一种场外衍生品，可让交易者 24/7 投机油价。

items.title: Aave Labs targets billions in idle liquidity with V4 reinvestment module to lift yield for lenders
items.summary: Aave’s upcoming V4 upgrade introduces a reinvestment module designed to put idle liquidity to work and boost yields.
items.title_zh: Aave Labs 通过 V4 再投资模块瞄准数十亿美元的闲置流动性，以提高贷方的收益率
items.summary_zh: Aave 即将推出的 V4 升级引入了再投资模块，旨在让闲置流动性发挥作用并提高收益率。

items.title: Bitcoin Depot reshuffles leadership, projects 30% revenue drop in 2026
items.summary: Bitcoin Depot names Alex Holmes CEO as Scott Buchanan resigns, and signals 30%-40% revenue drop amid regulatory pressures.
items.title_zh: Bitcoin Depot 领导层改组，预计 2026 年收入下降 30%
items.summary_zh: 在 Scott Buchanan 辞职后，Bitcoin Depot 任命 Alex Holmes 为首席执行官，并表示在监管压力下收入将下降 30%-40%。

items.title: Irish drug dealer’s lost 500 BTC reawakens after 10 years, likely moved by police
items.summary: On Tuesday, a bitcoin wallet originally owned by Irish drug dealer Clifton Collins moved $35 million worth of BTC after 10 years of dormancy.
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰毒贩丢失的 500 BTC 10 年后重新苏醒，可能是被警方转移
items.summary_zh: 周二，最初由爱尔兰毒贩克利夫顿·柯林斯 (Clifton Collins) 拥有的一个比特币钱包在休眠 10 年后转移了价值 3500 万美元的比特币。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响力
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.
items.title_zh: 由于不良贷款增加，穆迪将 KKR 和未来标准运营的私人信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级
items.summary_zh: 穆迪此举是私人信贷陷入困境的最新迹象。散户投资者纷纷撤资，从黑石到阿波罗。

items.title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
items.summary: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.
items.title_zh: 从苹果公司到礼来公司等美国高管在中国发展高层论坛上调整了进军世界第二大经济体的计划
items.summary_zh: 本周末，80 多名全球高管前往北京参加国家组织的中国发展论坛。

items.title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
items.summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
items.title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入修正区间的美国基准指数
items.summary_zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

items.title: 'He liked the fear in our eyes,' Epstein survivors tell BBC
items.summary: In an interview with BBC Newsnight, five women abused by the disgraced financier describe the impact of their shared ordeal.
items.title_zh: 爱泼斯坦幸存者告诉 BBC：“他喜欢我们眼中的恐惧”
items.summary_zh: 在接受英国广播公司新闻之夜采访时，五名被这位名誉扫地的金融家虐待的女性描述了她们共同经历的磨难所造成的影响。

items.title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
items.summary: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.
items.title_zh: 丹麦首相未能在党内自 1903 年以来最弱的选举中获得多数席位
items.summary_zh: 该党自 2019 年以来一直执政，获得了最多选票，但在组建新政府方面面临着艰难的谈判。

items.title: Marcos promises 'flow of oil' as Philippines declares energy emergency
items.summary: The President says the country will procure one million barrels of oil to add to the current stock.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾宣布能源紧急状态时，马科斯承诺“石油供应”
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，该国将采购 100 万桶石油以增加当前库存。

items.title: Ghana demands compensation for slavery in landmark UN vote
items.summary: Nations will vote on whether to designate the slave trade as "the gravest crime against humanity".
items.title_zh: 加纳在具有里程碑意义的联合国投票中要求对奴隶制进行赔偿
items.summary_zh: 各国将投票决定是否将奴隶贸易定为“最严重的危害人类罪”。

items.title: Dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
items.summary: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚万人坑发现数十具尸体，其中大部分是婴儿
items.summary_zh: 据信，32 具尸体中的一些来自当地医院和太平间，其中包括 25 名儿童。

items.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
items.summary: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.
items.title_zh: 民主党推翻了佛罗里达州席位，其中包括特朗普的海湖庄园
items.summary_zh: 艾米丽·格雷戈里 (Emily Gregory) 预计将在一个立法选区获胜，共和党候选人将在 2024 年以 19 个百分点的优势获胜。

items.title: Talk show host Stephen Colbert to write new Lord of the Rings film
items.summary: Colbert, who is a Tolkien superfan, will adapt an early section of the first Lord of the Rings novel.
items.title_zh: 脱口秀主持人斯蒂芬·科尔伯特将撰写新的《指环王》电影
items.summary_zh: 科尔伯特是托尔金的超级粉丝，他将改编第一部《指环王》小说的早期部分。

items.title: Brazil's Bolsonaro gets temporary house arrest for ill-health
items.summary: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was moved from his cell to hospital earlier this month with pneumonia.
items.title_zh: 巴西总统博尔索纳罗因健康状况不佳被临时软禁
items.summary_zh: 前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗本月早些时候因肺炎从牢房转移到医院。

items.title: 'Fearless' Mel Schilling remembered by Married at First Sight co-star
items.summary: Paul C Brunson pays an emotional tribute to his fellow TV relationship expert, who died on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 《无畏》梅尔·席林被《一见钟情》联合主演纪念
items.summary_zh: 保罗·C·布伦森 (Paul C Brunson) 向周二去世的电视关系专家同事致以深切的哀悼。

items.title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
items.summary: The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.
items.title_zh: Meta 因在儿童安全问题上误导用户而被罚款 3.75 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Instagram、Facebook 和 WhatsApp 的所有者已被新墨西哥州法院判定承担责任。

items.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
items.summary: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将移民驱逐到喀麦隆的秘密协议
items.summary_zh: 在喀麦隆，特朗普政府找到了一个可以施压接受秘密驱逐移民的合作伙伴。

items.title: Ukraine Finally Got Battlefield Momentum. Now Comes a Russian Offensive.
items.summary: Moscow’s forces are intensifying their attacks in southern Ukraine after Kyiv made rare gains along the front.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰终于有了战场动力。现在俄罗斯的进攻来了。
items.summary_zh: 在基辅在前线取得罕见进展后，莫斯科军队正在加强对乌克兰南部的攻击。

items.title: Four Takeaways From Denmark’s Election
items.summary: A desire for change and a fractured political landscape left Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen ahead, but with a tough road to securing a new term.
items.title_zh: 丹麦大选的四个要点
items.summary_zh: 对变革的渴望和分裂的政治格局使总理梅特·弗雷德里克森 (Mette Frederiksen) 遥遥领先，但获得新任期的道路却很艰难。

items.title: Gambia Says the Island Is Cursed. Migrants Saw an Opportunity.
items.summary: Thousands of African migrants hoping to reach Europe have flocked to a remote island in Gambia that local villagers say is protected by a curse.
items.title_zh: 冈比亚称该岛被诅咒了。移民看到了机会。
items.summary_zh: 数千名希望前往欧洲的非洲移民涌向冈比亚的一个偏远岛屿，当地村民称该岛受到了诅咒的保护。

items.title: A Missile Fragment in a Schoolyard
items.summary: Examining an image of children near a missile fragment, which landed near a school as several families were sheltering inside it.
items.title_zh: 校园里的导弹碎片
items.summary_zh: 检查一枚导弹碎片附近儿童的图像，该碎片落在一所学校附近，当时有几个家庭正在里面避难。

items.title: Two Men Arrested in Attack on Jewish Charity Ambulances in London
items.summary: The police said the men, aged 45 and 47, are accused of arson with intent to endanger life stemming from the arson attack on Monday in Golders Green.
items.title_zh: 两名男子因袭击伦敦犹太慈善救护车而被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，这两名年龄分别为 45 岁和 47 岁的男子被指控在周一发生在戈尔德斯格林 (Golders Green) 的纵火袭击事件中，意图危及生命而纵火。

items.title: For Australia’s Farmers, Fuel Crisis Comes at ‘Worst Possible Time’
items.summary: Their troubles could cascade across Asia because they export a majority of their products.
items.title_zh: 对于澳大利亚农民来说，燃料危机出现在“最糟糕的时刻”
items.summary_zh: 他们的麻烦可能会蔓延到整个亚洲，因为他们的大部分产品都出口。

items.title: Retail traders fare worse on prediction markets than sportsbooks
items.summary: A new report from Citizens JMP says median losses are deeper on prediction platforms as retail traders face sharper, better-capitalized counterparties
items.title_zh: 零售交易者在预测市场上的表现比体育博彩差
items.summary_zh: Citizens JMP 的一份新报告称，随着零售交易者面临更敏锐、资本更雄厚的交易对手，预测平台上的损失中值更大

items.title: Circle selloff may miss the mark as Clarity Act targets distributors, not issuers: Bernstein
items.summary: Circle’s sharp stock drop may be overdone, Bernstein says, arguing investors are misinterpreting stablecoin yield restrictions.
items.title_zh: 伯恩斯坦：由于《清晰法案》针对的是分销商而不是发行人，圆形抛售可能会达不到目标
items.summary_zh: 伯恩斯坦表示，Circle 股价大幅下跌可能有些过头，他认为投资者误解了稳定币收益率限制。

items.title: South Korea sees $60 billion crypto outflows to overseas platforms and private wallets in H2 2025
items.summary: South Korea's FSC said this may be linked to an increase in arbitrage activities amid volatility in the crypto market.
items.title_zh: 2025 年下半年，韩国预计将有 600 亿美元的加密货币流出至海外平台和私人钱包
items.summary_zh: 韩国金融服务委员会表示，这可能与加密货币市场波动期间套利活动的增加有关。

items.title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine adds $145 million worth of ETH in latest buy: onchain analysts
items.summary: The company continued accumulating ether and remains the largest ETH treasury holder, followed by SharpLink and The Ether Machine.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 在最新收购中增加了价值 1.45 亿美元的 ETH：链上分析师
items.summary_zh: 该公司继续积累以太坊，并仍然是最大的以太坊金库持有者，其次是 SharpLink 和 The Ether Machine。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT

items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告

items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.

items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.

items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
